scripts.ci: pnpm run ci:frontend && pnpm run ci:backend
scripts.ci:frontend: pnpm --dir ineat-frontend run lint && pnpm --dir ineat-frontend run test:run && pnpm --dir ineat-frontend run build
scripts.ci:backend: pnpm --dir ineat-backend run lint:check && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/ineat pnpm --dir ineat-backend exec jest --runInBand --no-watchman && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/ineat pnpm --dir ineat-backend run build
